case_title: MELINDA BARRY VS. BEACON COLLEGE FUNDING SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,297.50 FILED BY BARRY, MELINDA AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON COLLEGE FUNDING SOLUTIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRY, MELINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEACON COLLEGE FUNDING SOLUTIONS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
